summary: First public Planban release: a local Codex-native board for agent-led planning, installable as a Git-backed Codex plugin marketplace.
updatePrompt: Install or update Planban from piercekearns/planban, follow the public GitHub README, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then open Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogSummary: Planban is now available as a clean public release: install it with Codex, open boards with /pb or /planban, keep planning state local, duplicate boards, and use CLI/API/MCP surfaces for agent-native workflows.
